items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Where The Goblins Came From".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Where the goblins came from published=Wed, 29 Apr 2026 20:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/where-the-goblins-came-from description=How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior. title=OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS published=Tue, 28 Apr 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/openai-on-aws description=OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
diff_excerpt: +description=How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
title=Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
description=OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
+title=OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
+description=OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
-description=Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.
-description=Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.
description=Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.
-description=OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.
